templates.name: Dependency SLI Breach in Customer Region
templates.template: Dependency service '{dependency_service_name}' (category: {dependency_category}) has SLI category '{sli_category}' breached in region '{region}' — a region where the primary customer has resources. {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions and {impacted_resources} resources affected over {total_impact_duration_min} min. Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}%. This is a leading indicator of potential customer impact.
templates.extracted_when: Dependency service SLI breached in a region where the customer has resources — leading indicator of potential cascade to primary service.

templates.name: Dependency SLI Breached Across Multiple Regions
templates.template: Dependency service '{dependency_service_name}' (category: {dependency_category}) has SLI category '{sli_category}' breached across {region_count} regions [{region_list}]. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}%. A single SLI breached in multiple customer regions indicates a widespread dependency issue — not isolated to one region.
templates.extracted_when: Same dependency SLI breached in 2+ customer regions — widespread dependency failure, not isolated to one region.

templates.name: Multiple SLIs Breached for Dependency Service
templates.template: Dependency service '{dependency_service_name}' (category: {dependency_category}) has {distinct_sli_count} distinct SLIs breached in regions [{region_list}]. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}%. Multiple SLI breaches indicate broad service-level degradation — elevated spill-over risk for the primary customer.
templates.extracted_when: Multiple distinct SLIs from the same dependency service are breached in the same customer region, indicating broad dependency service degradation.

templates.name: Multiple Dependency Services Degraded in Region
templates.template: Regions [{region_list}] have {distinct_dep_count} dependency services degraded with {distinct_sli_count} SLIs breached. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Multiple dependency services failing in the same customer regions indicates a broad regional platform issue — resource exhaustion, infrastructure failure, or cascading dependency chain.
templates.extracted_when: Two or more distinct dependency services show SLI breaches in the same customer region — the strongest dependency signal indicating regional platform stress.
